events.title: Taxes Made Simple: What Undocumented and International Students Need to Know
events.description: Need support filing your taxes as an undocumented or international student? Join Sophia Selassie for guidance on filing confidently and accurately.

events.title: Organic Chemistry Seminar: Empowering Organic Synthesis
events.description: Professor David Sarlah from Rice University discusses research on empowering organic synthesis through unique methods and complex natural products.

events.title: Live Income Tax Workshop
events.description: A workshop offering guidance on income tax preparation for students.

events.title: Graduate Research Seminar
events.description: A seminar given by a graduate student in the Department of Chemistry, with title and description to be announced.

events.title: Inorganic Chemistry Seminar: Size-Dependent Behavior in Porous Nanocrystals
events.description: Carl Brozek from the University of Oregon presents on synthesizing metal-organic frameworks as nanoparticles and their size-dependent behaviors.

events.title: The Grad Student Productive
events.description: A workshop for graduate students focusing on productivity strategies.

events.title: UndocuGrads: 25-26 Life After Berkeley Webinars
events.description: Explore options after college or graduate school, including academic and career planning for undocumented students.

events.title: Physics Colloquium with Tongyan Lin
events.description: A physics colloquium featuring a presentation by Tongyan Lin from the UC Berkeley Department of Physics.

events.title: 2026 CDP SPRING RESEARCH SYMPOSIUM: 'Saccharomyces cerevisiae: The Very Model of a Modern Model Organism'
events.description: A symposium honoring Distinguished Professor Emeritus Jeremy Thorner, focusing on 'Saccharomyces cerevisiae' as a model organism.

events.title: Ana Bahamonde. Gilead Lecture in Organic Chemistry
events.description: A lecture by Ana Bahamonde, Assistant Professor of Chemistry at UC Riverside, on topics in organic chemistry.

events.title: BITSS Annual Meeting 2026
events.organizer: Berkeley Initiative for Transparency in the Social Sciences (BITSS)
events.location: UC Berkeley Haas School of Business
events.description: The 14th BITSS Annual Meeting sharing novel research and discussing efforts to improve the credibility of social science research.

events.title: Research Transparency and Reproducibility Training (RT2) 2026
events.organizer: Berkeley Initiative for Transparency in the Social Sciences (BITSS)
events.description: A three-day training providing an overview of tools and best practices for transparent and reproducible social science research.

events.title: AI Leadership Accelerator - Day 1
events.description: An intensive in-person curriculum for senior leaders focusing on AI strategy, organizational readiness, governance, and long-term value creation.

events.title: AI Leadership Accelerator - Day 2
events.description: Day two of the AI Leadership Accelerator program, focusing on advanced AI strategies and ethical deployment in business.

events.title: AI Leadership Accelerator - Day 3
events.description: The final day of the AI Leadership Accelerator, concluding with insights on building AI teams and cultural integration.

events.title: Youth & AI Innovation Summit 2026
events.description: A summit where young innovators explore, build, and showcase ideas related to AI and interdisciplinary projects, featuring student and startup demos.

events.title: Future-Ready Families Workshop (part of Youth & AI Innovation Summit)
events.description: A focused session for parents and educators on navigating the AI era, admissions, career pathways, and project-based portfolios.

events.title: Physics Colloquium with Daniel S. Fisher: Red Queen Evolution from Tropical Oceans to Fitness Snowscapes
events.description: A colloquium by Daniel S. Fisher from Stanford University, discussing the extensive within-species diversity and continual evolution in bacteria.

events.title: National Workshop on Data Science Education
events.organizer: UC Berkeley's Data Science Undergraduate Studies
events.description: A multi-day event series offering opportunities to learn about data science education and meet fellow educators shaping the discipline.

events.title: A.I.M by Kyle Abraham
events.description: A dance performance by A.I.M by Kyle Abraham, part of Cal Performances' season.

events.title: Noon Concert: University Baroque Ensemble
events.description: The University Baroque Ensemble presents selections from Baroque concertos by Bach, Sammartini, and Vivaldi, featuring student soloists.

events.title: Adaptation by Elaine May, Directed by Joshua Gould
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Department of Theater, Dance, and Performance Studies
events.description: A satiric comedy portraying everyday life with its anarchic madness and banal familiarity. Part of the Spring Workshop series.

events.title: Composition Colloquium: Freida Abtan (Sound and Image)
events.description: A colloquium focusing on the intersection of sound and image in composition, featuring Freida Abtan.

events.title: University Wind Ensemble
events.description: The UC Berkeley Wind Ensemble performs works by Gustav Holst, Zhou Tian, and Mark Camphouse.

events.title: Friday Concert: Faculty Recital (Stacey Pelinka, flute. Leighton Fong, cello.)
events.description: A faculty recital featuring Stacey Pelinka on flute and Leighton Fong on cello, performing a selection of pieces.

events.title: Composition Colloquium: Pablo Teutli (Transmodernity in poetry and modernity in art)
events.description: Pablo Teutli discusses 'Transmodernity in poetry and modernity in art' in this composition colloquium.

events.title: UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra
events.description: The UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra performs works including Keiko Abe's 'Prism Rhapsody' and Prokofiev's 'Sinfonia Concertante in E minor'.

events.title: Eileen Ivers concert
events.description: A live concert performance by the acclaimed fiddler Eileen Ivers, known for her innovative blending of traditional Irish music with contemporary sounds.

events.title: Composition Colloquium: Tacet(i) Ensemble
events.description: Southeast Asia's leading contemporary music ensemble, Tacet(i), performs new works by regional and international composers.

events.title: UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus, University Chorus, UCBSO
events.description: A joint performance by the UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus, University Chorus, and the UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra.

events.title: African Music Ensemble
events.description: A vibrant performance by the UC Berkeley African Music Ensemble, showcasing traditional and contemporary African musical forms.

events.title: Composition Colloquium: Jenny Xiong (Seasons, Silence, and Art)
events.description: Jenny Xiong explores the themes of seasons, silence, and art in this composition colloquium.

events.title: Music Studies Colloquium: Birgit Lodes (Echoes of Dedication: Beethoven and the Women Who Shaped His Art)
events.description: Birgit Lodes discusses Beethoven and the women who influenced his art, exploring historical and musical perspectives.

events.title: An Evening of Creative Jazz (Berkeley Nu Jazz Collective and the Ben Goldberg/Myra Melford Group)
events.description: An evening featuring improvisational and creative jazz from the Berkeley Nu Jazz Collective and the Ben Goldberg/Myra Melford Group.

events.title: Windborne Music
events.description: A live music performance by Windborne, featuring traditional and contemporary folk music.

events.title: UC Davis Aggies at California Golden Bears Baseball
events.location: Evans Diamond at Stu Gordon Stadium, Berkeley, CA
events.description: The Cal Bears baseball team hosts the UC Davis Aggies in a home game at Stu Gordon Stadium.

events.title: California Golden Bears Men's Basketball vs. SMU Mustangs Men's Basketball
events.description: The Cal Bears men's basketball team faces the SMU Mustangs in a home game.

events.title: Sacramento State Hornets at California Golden Bears Baseball
events.location: Evans Diamond at Stu Gordon Stadium, Berkeley, CA
events.description: The Cal Bears baseball team plays against the Sacramento State Hornets at home.

events.title: California Golden Bears Men's Basketball vs. Pittsburgh Panthers Men's Basketball
events.description: The Cal Bears men's basketball team hosts the Pittsburgh Panthers in a conference matchup.

events.title: North Carolina Tar Heels at California Golden Bears Baseball
events.description: The Cal Bears baseball team begins an ACC series against the North Carolina Tar Heels.

events.title: North Carolina Tar Heels at California Golden Bears Baseball
events.description: Game two of the ACC baseball series between the Cal Bears and the North Carolina Tar Heels.

events.title: North Carolina Tar Heels at California Golden Bears Baseball
events.description: The final game of the ACC baseball series between the Cal Bears and the North Carolina Tar Heels.

events.title: Cal Invitational Track & Field
events.description: The Cal Bears host their annual outdoor track & field invitational at Edwards Stadium.

events.title: Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events Track & Field
events.description: Day one of the Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events competition for track & field athletes.

events.title: Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events Track & Field
events.description: Day two of the Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events competition, featuring various track & field events.

events.title: Career Counseling 1:1's Drop Ins
events.description: Drop-in career counseling sessions for graduate students.

events.title: Meet & Greet with Native Graduate Student Orgs.
events.description: An opportunity for graduate students to meet and network with various Native graduate student organizations.

events.title: Career Counseling 1:1's Drop Ins
events.description: Drop-in career counseling sessions for graduate students.

events.title: STEM*FYI: World Wildlife Day: Terrarium-Making Night!
events.description: Join STEM*FYI for a terrarium-making night to celebrate World Wildlife Day, including dinner and social activities.

events.title: Developing Skills for Careers Beyond Academia (Virtual)
events.description: A virtual workshop for graduate students on developing skills for career paths outside of academia.

events.title: Mental Health and the Job Search Panel (Virtual)
events.description: A virtual panel discussion on managing mental health during the job search process for graduate students.

events.title: Handshake for Graduate Students (Virtual)
events.description: A virtual workshop to help graduate students utilize Handshake for career opportunities and job searching.

events.title: Networking for Non-Academic Career Exploration and Preparation (Virtual)
events.description: A virtual networking event for graduate students exploring and preparing for non-academic careers.

events.title: Planning Your Summer (Virtual)
events.description: A virtual workshop to help graduate students plan their summer activities and academic/professional goals.

events.title: 2026 - College of Computing, Data Science, and Society Undergraduate Commencement Ceremonies (9:00 AM Session)
events.organizer: UC Berkeley College of Computing, Data Science, and Society
events.description: The morning session of the undergraduate commencement ceremonies for students graduating with degrees in Computer Science, Data Science, or Statistics.

events.organizer: UC Berkeley College of Computing, Data Science, and Society
events.description: The afternoon session of the undergraduate commencement ceremonies for students graduating with degrees in Computer Science, Data Science, or Statistics.

events.title: Forest Innovation Summit 2026: Innovation Day
events.description: Initiating a global dialogue on forestry innovations, encouraging exchange through environmental, social, and political perspectives.

events.title: Forest Innovation Summit 2026: Dialogue & Exchange
events.description: Day two of the Forest Innovation Summit, continuing the transatlantic exchange of knowledge and ideas for sustainable forestry.

events.title: Collider Cup XVIII - Berkeley's Premier Student Startup Pitch Competition
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology (SCET)
events.description: Top student teams pitch their projects to professors, investors, and industry experts for a chance to win the grand prize.
